title: Convert Sorted Array to Binary Search Tree
titleCn: 将有序数组转换为二叉搜索树

testcases.input: nums = [-10,-3,0,5,9] Output: [0,-3,9,-10,null,5] Explanation: [0,-10,5,null,-3,null,9] is also accepted:
testcases.expectedOutput: [0,-3,9,-10,null,5] Explanation: [0,-10,5,null,-3,null,9] is also accepted:

testcases.input: nums = [1,3] Output: [3,1] Explanation: [1,null,3] and [3,1] are both height-balanced BSTs.
